name: anneal-umbrella-dev
description: Development marketplace for the three Anneal architecture variants: Cast (linear), Alloy (tournament), Temper (fixed-point deepen). Install one or all three for head-to-head comparison.

plugins.name: anneal-cast
plugins.description: Linear single-pour architecture. One planner, one pass. Fastest of the three. Best for scoped tasks.

plugins.name: anneal-alloy
plugins.description: Tournament consensus architecture. N parallel planners with biases, synthesizer blends. Best for novel architecture.

plugins.name: anneal-temper
plugins.description: Fixed-point deepen architecture. Iterative refinement with variance-based convergence. Best for complex but scoped tasks.
